name: Furious Retaliation
rulesText:
Barbarian Ability — Recruit
Reaction
Trigger: While this character is Raging, an enemy melee attack deals at least 1 HP damage to this character.
Deal 1 Physical Damage to that enemy. Move Furious Retaliation to this character's Status Row.
Return Furious Retaliation to its equipped Skill Card at the end of the round.
This damage is not a weapon attack and does not count as damage dealt during this character's shared activation.

source.sourceSection: Recruit Barbarian Ability Cards > Furious Retaliation
source.notes: Furious Retaliation is a Barbarian-only reaction. It can trigger only while the owner is Raging and actually takes at least 1 HP damage from an enemy melee attack. Its retaliation damage is not a weapon attack, does not generate Heat, and does not count toward Rage maintenance.
